Class AssumesFormulaInstSeq

java.lang.Object
org.key_project.prover.rules.instantiation.AssumesFormulaInstSeq
All Implemented Interfaces:
AssumesFormulaInstantiation
public class AssumesFormulaInstSeq extends Object implements AssumesFormulaInstantiation

Instantiation of an assumes-formula that is present as a formula of the proof goal's sequent.

This instantiation kind is used if the formula used as an instantiation for one of the assumes-formulas is syntactically present in the sequent. In that case the instantiation has not to be proven to be valid as part of a separate proof goal.
